question: For accounts with defaulted loans, what is the ratio of withdrawal transactions to deposit transactions?
my_sql:
SELECT 
    CAST(SUM(CASE WHEN t.type = 'VYDAJ' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS REAL) 
    / NULLIF(SUM(CASE WHEN t.type = 'PRIJEM' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END), 0) AS withdrawal_deposit_ratio
FROM trans t
JOIN loan l ON t.account_id = l.account_id
WHERE l.status = 'D'
gold_sql: SELECT CAST(SUM(CASE WHEN trans.type = 'VYDAJ' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS REAL) / NULLIF(SUM(CASE WHEN trans.type = 'PRIJEM' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END), 0) AS withdrawal_deposit_ratio FROM trans JOIN loan ON trans.account_id = loan.account_id WHERE loan.status = 'D'
